fixed_skill.desc:
Deal Fire damage to 1 foe equal to 48.0%/50.4%/52.8% of Attack (4 hits), and inflict Ascetic Ordeals for 3 turns.
Ascetic Ordeals: Each time 1 hit of Fire damage is taken, increase critical damage taken by 3%. Stacks up to 8 times.
fixed_skill.name: Exorcising Flames

innate_skill.desc: Deal Fire damage to all foes equal to 60.8/63.8/66.9% of Attack. 33.8/35.5/37.2% chance to inflict Burn for 2 turns.
innate_skill.name: Maragidyne

passive_skill.desc:
Increase Attack by 29.1%.
After dealing damage with a skill, grant Threefold Transcendence to the user and the Sweeper or Assassin with the highest Attack for 2 turns.
Threefold Transcendence: When dealing 4 or more hits of damage with a single skill, increase user's Attack by 8%, and damage by 7%.
passive_skill.name: Threefold Blessings

passive_skill.desc:
Increase Attack by 29.1%.
After dealing damage with a skill, grant Threefold Transcendence to the user and the Sweeper or Assassin with the highest Attack for 3 turns.
Threefold Transcendence: When dealing 4 or more hits of damage with a single skill, increase user's Attack by 8%, and damage by 7%.
passive_skill.name: Threefold Blessings I

passive_skill.desc:
Increase Attack by 29.1%.
After dealing damage with a skill, grant Threefold Transcendence to the user and the Sweeper or Assassin with the highest Attack for 3 turns.
Threefold Transcendence: When dealing 4 or more hits of damage with a single skill, increase user's Attack by 12%, and damage by 7%.
passive_skill.name: Threefold Blessings II

passive_skill.desc:
Increase Attack by 29.1%.
After dealing damage with a skill, grant Threefold Transcendence to the user and the Sweeper or Assassin with the highest Attack for 3 turns.
Threefold Transcendence: When dealing 4 or more hits of damage with a single skill, increase user's Attack by 12%, and damage by 10%.
passive_skill.name: Threefold Blessings III

showtime_skill.desc: Deal Fire damage to 1 foe equal to 360.0%/385.2%/410.4% of Attack.
showtime_skill.name: Highlight
